provisions.title: AMENDING THE DIVORCE LAW
provisions.content:
-414-

                       [E 6 . dl9 -- 620 omitted).
                             See Spanish text.

        MILITARY GOVERNMENT O F SANTO DOMINGO.

                        Executive Order No. 621.
                      Amending the Divorce Law.
                              0. G. No. 3216.

        By virtue of the powers vested in the Military Government
    of Santo Domingo, the fo’llowing Executive Order is hereby pro-
    mulgated :

         ARTICLE 1. In all cases in wich the “Law of Divorce and
    Segregation of Pmers’ons and Property” requires the interested
    parties to appear in person before the Tribunal, Court of First
    Instance o r other Court, the spouse wh’o, by virtue of ,absence or
,   other cause, is unable to appear personally, should do so by
    pn>ry. The ,power of attorney. should be authentic, and the object
    threof clearly expressed.

        ARTICLE 2. All laws and parts of laws in conflict here-
    with are hereby repeakd.

                                    THOMAS SNOWDEN,
                                Rear-Admiral, United S t a b s Navy,
                               Military Governor of Santo Domingb.

    Saato Domingo, D. R.,
    April 27, 1921.

                            (E. 0 . 6 2 2 omitted)
                             See Spanish text.
